Find the section about @openmnemo/report Package and update it to reflect the current state. Also update any version references.

Key facts to record:
1. All 5 packages are now at version 0.2.2 (published to npm)
2. Doubao TXT parser is now implemented in TypeScript (parseDoubaoTranscript in packages/core/src/transcript/parse.ts)
   - Format: plain TXT with Title/URL/Created header + User:/AI: turn blocks
   - Auto-detects via filename prefix 'doubao_' or path containing '/doubao/'
   - Handles Windows CRLF via split(/r?\n/)
   - Exported from @openmnemo/core
3. All 5 packages now have noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes in tsconfig
4. All packages have testTimeout: 15000 in vitest.config.ts
5. GitHub Actions SHA-pinned, dependabot.yml added
6. Test count: ~602 tests (core 237, sync 71, report 196, cli 99)
7. publish.yml is idempotent (skips already-published versions)
8. README rewritten for end users with Quick Start

Do NOT add duplicate information. Update existing entries where possible. Keep MEMORY.md under 200 lines.
I'll read the current MEMORY.md file first, then update it with the new information.
Now I'll update the MEMORY.md with the new information, consolidating and updating existing entries while keeping it under 200 lines.

- Final file is 72 lines, well under the 200-line limit

input.content:
# MemoryTree Project Memory

## Key Project
- **memorytree-workflow** skill at: `C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/`
- Working repo: `D:/demo1/openmnemo/`

## Versions
- All 5 packages (`@openmnemo/types`, `core`, `sync`, `report`, `cli`) at **v0.2.2** (published to npm)
- `publish.yml` is idempotent — skips already-published versions
- GitHub Actions SHA-pinned; `dependabot.yml` added

## Architecture
- NodeNext ESM TypeScript, strict mode
- All packages: `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` + `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` in tsconfig
- All packages: `testTimeout: 15000` in vitest.config.ts
- All imports need `.js` extension (e.g., `from './stats.js'`)
- Tests in `tests/` with Vitest, mock `node:os` homedir to tmpdir
- Build with `tsup`, entry: `src/cli/main.ts` → `dist/cli.js`
- README rewritten for end users with Quick Start

## Doubao TXT Parser
- `parseDoubaoTranscript` in `packages/core/src/transcript/parse.ts`
- Format: plain TXT with Title/URL/Created header + `User:` / `AI:` turn blocks
- Auto-detects via filename prefix `doubao_` or path containing `/doubao/`
- Handles Windows CRLF via `split(/\r?\n/)`
- Exported from `@openmnemo/core`
- `packages/types`: Client type includes `'doubao'`

## @openmnemo/report Package
- Package at `packages/report/` — ported from skill `src/report/`
- Entry: `packages/report/src/index.ts` → exports `buildReport` + `BuildReportOptions`
- Import rules: `@openmnemo/types` (ManifestEntry), `./types.js` (ReportStats etc.), `./log.js` (getLogger)
- CLI: `openmnemo report build --root . --output ./Memory/07_reports --no-ai`
- CLI: `openmnemo report serve --dir ./Memory/07_reports --port 3000`
- `packages/sync/config`: 7 new fields: generate_report, locale, ai_summary_model, gh_pages_branch, cname, webhook_url, report_base_url
- `src/types/report.ts` — BuildReportOptions has locale/ghPagesBranch/cname/webhookUrl/newSessionIds
- `src/report/build.ts` — orchestrator: all new pages + deploy/webhook integration
- `src/report/i18n/` — types.ts (Translations), en.ts, zh-CN.ts, index.ts (loadLocale)
- `src/report/render/` — css, layout, charts, dashboard, transcript-list, transcript, knowledge, goals, todos, archive, projects, graph, search, links, markdown
- `src/report/deploy/` — github-pages.ts (git subtree push), webhook.ts (feishu/telegram/discord/slack/generic)
- Output structure: index.html, graph.html, projects/, transcripts/, goals/, todos/, knowledge/, archive/, search.html

## Config Fields (config.ts)
- `generate_report: boolean` (default: false)
- `ai_summary_model: string` (default: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001')
- `locale: string` (default: 'en', supports 'zh-CN')
- `gh_pages_branch: string` (default: '' = skip deploy)
- `cname: string` (default: '' = no CNAME file)
- `webhook_url: string` (default: '' = no webhook)

## Layout (v2)
- Sidebar nav (240px fixed), hamburger on mobile (<768px), theme toggle (dark/light)
- localStorage key `mt-theme`, dark default, light theme via `[data-theme="light"]`
- Popover preview: `data-summary` + `data-meta` on session links
- htmlShell now accepts `lang` param (5th arg)

## Clean Markdown Format
Messages in `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/{client}/.../*.md`:
- Section: `## Messages`
- Per message: `### N. role\n- Timestamp: \`ISO\`\n\ntext`
- No tool events in clean markdown (only in raw JSONL)

## Test Count
- ~602 tests passing: core 237, sync 71, report 196, cli 99
- Coverage: i18n, projects, graph, deploy/github-pages, deploy/webhook, config, doubao parser

# currentDate
Today's date is 2026-03-18.

# MemoryTree Project Memory

## Key Project
- **memorytree-workflow** skill at: `C:/Users/ai/.codex/skills/memorytree-workflow/`
- Working repo: `D:/demo1/openmnemo/`

## Versions
- All 5 packages (`@openmnemo/types`, `core`, `sync`, `report`, `cli`) at **v0.2.2** (published to npm)
- `publish.yml` is idempotent — skips already-published versions
- GitHub Actions SHA-pinned; `dependabot.yml` added

## Architecture
- NodeNext ESM TypeScript, strict mode
- All packages: `noUncheckedIndexedAccess` + `exactOptionalPropertyTypes` in tsconfig
- All packages: `testTimeout: 15000` in vitest.config.ts
- All imports need `.js` extension (e.g., `from './stats.js'`)
- Tests in `tests/` with Vitest, mock `node:os` homedir to tmpdir
- Build with `tsup`, entry: `src/cli/main.ts` → `dist/cli.js`
- README rewritten for end users with Quick Start

## Doubao TXT Parser
- `parseDoubaoTranscript` in `packages/core/src/transcript/parse.ts`
- Format: plain TXT with Title/URL/Created header + `User:` / `AI:` turn blocks
- Auto-detects via filename prefix `doubao_` or path containing `/doubao/`
- Handles Windows CRLF via `split(/\r?\n/)`
- Exported from `@openmnemo/core`
- `packages/types`: Client type includes `'doubao'`

## @openmnemo/report Package
- Package at `packages/report/` — ported from skill `src/report/`
- Entry: `packages/report/src/index.ts` → exports `buildReport` + `BuildReportOptions`
- Import rules: `@openmnemo/types` (ManifestEntry), `./types.js` (ReportStats etc.), `./log.js` (getLogger)
- CLI: `openmnemo report build --root . --output ./Memory/07_reports --no-ai`
- CLI: `openmnemo report serve --dir ./Memory/07_reports --port 3000`
- `packages/sync/config`: 7 new fields: generate_report, locale, ai_summary_model, gh_pages_branch, cname, webhook_url, report_base_url
- `src/types/report.ts` — BuildReportOptions has locale/ghPagesBranch/cname/webhookUrl/newSessionIds
- `src/report/build.ts` — orchestrator: all new pages + deploy/webhook integration
- `src/report/i18n/` — types.ts (Translations), en.ts, zh-CN.ts, index.ts (loadLocale)
- `src/report/render/` — css, layout, charts, dashboard, transcript-list, transcript, knowledge, goals, todos, archive, projects, graph, search, links, markdown
- `src/report/deploy/` — github-pages.ts (git subtree push), webhook.ts (feishu/telegram/discord/slack/generic)
- Output structure: index.html, graph.html, projects/, transcripts/, goals/, todos/, knowledge/, archive/, search.html

## Config Fields (config.ts)
- `generate_report: boolean` (default: false)
- `ai_summary_model: string` (default: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001')
- `locale: string` (default: 'en', supports 'zh-CN')
- `gh_pages_branch: string` (default: '' = skip deploy)
- `cname: string` (default: '' = no CNAME file)
- `webhook_url: string` (default: '' = no webhook)

## Layout (v2)
- Sidebar nav (240px fixed), hamburger on mobile (<768px), theme toggle (dark/light)
- localStorage key `mt-theme`, dark default, light theme via `[data-theme="light"]`
- Popover preview: `data-summary` + `data-meta` on session links
- htmlShell now accepts `lang` param (5th arg)

## Clean Markdown Format
Messages in `Memory/06_transcripts/clean/{client}/.../*.md`:
- Section: `## Messages`
- Per message: `### N. role\n- Timestamp: \`ISO\`\n\ntext`
- No tool events in clean markdown (only in raw JSONL)

## Test Count
- ~602 tests passing: core 237, sync 71, report 196, cli 99
- Coverage: i18n, projects, graph, deploy/github-pages, deploy/webhook, config, doubao parser

# currentDate
Today's date is 2026-03-18.
